title: Date Cherry Crunchy Stir Fry
description: This fermented, crumbly Algerian dish is perfect for a cozy date night, featuring plant-based-friendly dates and cherries in a savory stir-fry.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons tahini
ingredients.notes: use for added creaminess and depth of flavor

ingredients.name: 3/4 cup dates, pitted
ingredients.notes: preferably fermented to enhance sweetness and ferment aroma

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
ingredients.notes: fresh or frozen can be used, adjust chopping as needed for the texture preference

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons maple syrup
ingredients.notes: adjust to taste with salt and pepper

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon ground cumin
ingredients.notes: improves flavor and aroma of the dish, optional

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: add for a smoky, slightly spicy touch to complement the sweetness

instructions: Combine tahini with maple syrup in a small bowl until smooth.
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Add frozen mixed vegetables and stir-fry for about 3 minutes until they start to soften slightly.
Add pitted dates, cherry tomatoes, cumin, smoked paprika, and salt pepper; cook for another 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Drizzle the tahini mixture over the vegetables, stirring well until evenly coated. Cook for an additional 1 minute.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
